title: Arrow Camera Control
description: This mod allows you to rotate camera with arrows
body:
# Arrow Camera Control

This mod allows you to rotate your camera using arrows



Also you can customize it to other keys:

![keybinds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a1ca377a77ef81ea74b4c920121d6d0316cb0ec.png)


## Is it good for something?

This mod is good for people who has troubles with mouse, or for people who are playing through remote desktop, and they have mouse problems. This solves it



## Highly recommended

Change your mining, placing keys to don't be on mouse, for better gameplay

[![Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7687f60c02535d479dc55156b8de1a776f63ebbb.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tejty)

[![Custom mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2e75104b0340c21d2685ed2d81a8ee8b1be0936.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tejty/commissions)
